//: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno) config. Functions are Deno; pure logic modules (*.logic.ts) avoid Deno globals so they run under Vitest (Node) in CI (TDD Part 1 §3 #17).
//imports: @panchangpal/shared and /ai map to their BUILT dist output: Deno does not rewrite the packages' TS-ESM '.js' import specifiers to '.ts', so it must consume the emitted .js (run `pnpm build` first — CD builds them before deploy). Vitest/Jest use their own src aliases and are unaffected.
